name: spo-remove-sitecollection-admins-after-providing-support
title: Get and Remove Site Admins after providing Support.
shortDescription: Find site collection administrators granted for support cases and remove them once support is complete
longDescription: Regularly reports on directly-assigned site collection administrators that match a known list of support/admin accounts across all sites in the tenant, exporting them to CSV so they can be reviewed and flagged, then removes the flagged administrators on a second run.

thumbnails.alt: Preview of the sample Get and Remove Site Admins after providing Support.
